matched.detector: applicant statement: i certify that all information i have provided in order to apply for and secure work with sunsource ("the employer") and it's affiliate companies is true, complete and correct. i understand that the employer does not unlawfully discriminate in employment and no question on this application is used for the purpose of limiting or excusing any applicant from consideration for employment on a basis prohibited by applicable local, provincial, or federal law.if i am hired, i understand that i am free to resign at any time, with or without cause and with or without prior notice, and the employer reserves the same right to terminate my employment at any time, with or without cause and with or without prior notice, except as may be by law. i understand that any information provided by me that is found to be false, incomplete or misrepresented in any respect, will be sufficient cause to (i) eliminate me from further consideration for employment, or (ii) may result in my immediate discharge from the employer's service, whenever it is discovered. i understand this application does not constitute an agreement or contract for employment for any specified period or definite duration.
matched.ai: APPLICANT STATEMENT: I certify that all information I have provided in order to apply for and secure work with SunSource ("the employer") and it's affiliate companies is true, complete and correct. I understand that the employer does not unlawfully discriminate in employment and no question on this application is used for the purpose of limiting or excusing any applicant from consideration for employment on a basis prohibited by applicable local, provincial, or federal law.If I am hired, I understand that I am free to resign at any time, with or without cause and with or without prior notice, and the employer reserves the same right to terminate my employment at any time, with or without cause and with or without prior notice, except as may be required by law. I understand that any information provided by me that is found to be false, incomplete or misrepresented in any respect, will be sufficient cause to (i) eliminate me from further consideration for employment, or (ii) may result in my immediate discharge from the employer's service, whenever it is discovered. I understand this application does not constitute an agreement or contract for employment for any specified period or definite duration.

detector_only: I consent to receiving text messages
ai_only: Text Messaging OPT IN: Do you OPT IN and provide your express written consent to receive informational TEXT MESSAGES from SunSource or an affiliate company regarding this job opportunity or future job opportunities? Be aware that message frequency will vary and msg & data rates may apply. You may OPT OUT at any time by replying “STOP” or “UNSUBSCRIBE” to any text message received.

ai.notes: The form uses a Lever-based application system with standard fields and custom card-based questions. LinkedIn auto-fill is present.

fields.question: Which location are you applying for?
Are you over the age of 18?

Do you currently require this company’s immigration sponsorship for work authorization in order to onboard and work with this company? This includes if you require support for H-1B (including transfer, amendment, extension, and/or annual quota/lottery), H-1B1, O-1, E-3, TN, F-1 STEM, F-1 CPT, or similar.

In order to maintain your continued ability to work, will you in the future require this company’s immigration sponsorship for work authorization? This includes if you will in the future require support for H-1B (including transfer, amendment, extension, and/or annual quota/lottery), H-1B1, O-1, E-3, TN, F-1 STEM, F-1 CPT, or similar.
What is your desired annual salary or hourly rate of pay?
Were you referred by a current employee?
If you were referred by a current employee, who referred you?

Text Messaging OPT IN: Do you OPT IN and provide your express written consent to receive informational TEXT MESSAGES from SunSource or an affiliate company regarding this job opportunity or future job opportunities? Be aware that message frequency will vary and msg & data rates may apply. You may OPT OUT at any time by replying “STOP” or “UNSUBSCRIBE” to any text message received.
options: Yes, I provide my express written consent to receive informational TEXT MESSAGES regarding this job opportunity or job opportunities in the future from SunSource or an affiliate company. I am aware that message frequency will vary and that msg & data rates may apply. I confirm I understand that I can respond “STOP” or “UNSUBSCRIBE” at any time to cancel.

fields.question: APPLICANT STATEMENT: I certify that all information I have provided in order to apply for and secure work with SunSource ("the employer") and it's affiliate companies is true, complete and correct. I understand that the employer does not unlawfully discriminate in employment and no question on this application is used for the purpose of limiting or excusing any applicant from consideration for employment on a basis prohibited by applicable local, provincial, or federal law.If I am hired, I understand that I am free to resign at any time, with or without cause and with or without prior notice, and the employer reserves the same right to terminate my employment at any time, with or without cause and with or without prior notice, except as may be required by law. I understand that any information provided by me that is found to be false, incomplete or misrepresented in any respect, will be sufficient cause to (i) eliminate me from further consideration for employment, or (ii) may result in my immediate discharge from the employer's service, whenever it is discovered. I understand this application does not constitute an agreement or contract for employment for any specified period or definite duration.
options: Yes, I have read and understand this APPLICANT STATEMENT

American Indian or Alaska Native (Not Hispanic or Latino)
Two or More Races (Not Hispanic or Latino)

options: I am not a Protected Veteran
